title: Adult Mouse Ear Dissociation Protocol on Ice
author: Andrew Potter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ucwesxe
materials: Dissect out ear tissue and place in ice-cold hypothermosol on ice.
Examine using hemocytometer with trypan blue.

steps.title: Using forceps, transfer ear tissue to petri dish on ice
steps.instruction: Using forceps, transfer ear tissue to petri dish on ice. Mince ear tissue thoroughly on ice for 3-4 min on ice into 1-mm3 pieces using razor blade while manipulating tissue with forceps – you will need to use grinding motion and vigorously break up tissue. 00:04:00, mince tissue

steps.title: Place 23 mg minced tissue into 1 mL B
steps.instruction: Place 23 mg minced tissue into 1 mL B. Lich enzyme cocktail. Incubate on ice. 23 mg, tissue

steps.title: Shake every min; triturate every 2...
steps.instruction: Shake every min; triturate every 2 min with p1000 w/tip cut (start triturating at 2 min) for 20 minutes. 00:01:00, shake vigorously 00:02:00, triturate 10x 00:20:00, digest on ice

steps.title: After 20 mins of triturating on...
steps.instruction: After 20 mins of triturating on ice, use pipet to transfer digest mix to 2 mL dounce homogenizer . Use 10 strokes of Pestle A every 2 min (4 series total, 8 min). Digest mix should become turbid. 00:02:00, dounce homogenize

steps.title: At 28 min total digest time...
steps.instruction: At 28 min total digest time , let tissue chunks settle in dounce homogenizer for 2 min. Transfer 90% of supernatant (containing released cells) using 1 mL serological pipet onto a 30 µM filter placed on a 15 mL conical. 00:02:00, let tissue settle

steps.title: Rinse filter w/5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Rinse filter w/5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Save flow through containing released cells on ice and keep filter on tube for 2nd layer.

steps.title: Add additional 1 mL b
steps.instruction: Add additional 1 mL b. lich enzyme mix to residual tissue chunks in dounce homogenizer. Continue incubating on ice.

steps.title: Use 10 strokes of pestle A every 2 min
steps.instruction: Use 10 strokes of pestle A every 2 min. for 15 additional minutes (45 min. total time). 00:02:00, dounce 00:15:00, additional digest time

steps.title: Transfer entire volume to same 30...
steps.instruction: Transfer entire volume to same 30 µM filter on 15 mL conical . Rinse with additional 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BA 0.04%.

steps.title: Centrifuge cells for 300 g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cells for 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant & re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant & re-suspend in 100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% (leave in 15 mL conical).

steps.title: Add 1 mL RBC lysis buffer to cell mix
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL RBC lysis buffer to cell mix. Triturate 10X. Let sit on ice for 2 min.

steps.title: Add 12 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Add 12 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% to dilute RBC lysis buffer.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for five min
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for five min. Remove supernatant. Re-suspend in 100-200 µL PBS/BSA 0.04%.

steps.title: Adjust concentration to 1,000 cells/µL for...
steps.instruction: Adjust concentration to 1,000 cells/µL for Chromium or 100 cells/µL for DropSeq.
